issuing_bodies: Australian Government Department of Health, Disability and Ageing
National Health and Medical Research Council
Australian Commission on Safety and Quality in Health Care
Royal Australian College of General Practitioners
Cardiac Society of Australia and New Zealand

preferred_authorities.access_note: Use only when the operator has lawful access. Do not fabricate inaccessible content.

source_order: current Australian national or state guidance
current AMC publications for examination mechanics only
licensed Australian clinical references when available
international primary guidance only when Australian guidance is absent and the limitation is explicit
forbidden: exam recall material as treatment authority
claiming a source was archived when no archive exists
locking_rule: A case cannot be locked until every high-risk or critical claim is supported, every source has an archived file hash, and named human source and clinical reviews pass.
